title: Create: Igneodynamics
description: Create: Igneodynamics allows you to have a renewable source of Create Rocks like Asurine, Veridium, Crimsite, etc...
body:
# Create: Igneodynamics

Create: Igneodynamics is inspired by the Vents and Volcanos present in Oxygen Not Included, generating small volcanos around your world of different types of rocks. Bellow the molten rock you will find the core, which when Active will produce huge ammounts of molten rock, that can be processed into valuable materials.

The type of volcanos present include all Create rocks, and [TFMG](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-tfmg) rocks, along some Vanilla and a brand new one to facilitate the production of Sulfur. You can turn Molten Rock back into Solid using the Vacuumizing process from [Create: Vintage Improvements]([https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-vintage-improvements](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-vintage-improvements)).

A Dormant Volcano won't produce Molten Rock, it has to be activated first, any type of explosion will work, but the easiest way is with TNT, upon the block being exploded it will become Active, be **prepared, as they can overflow with fluid and start spilling molten rock** above themselves if you cannot pump them out fast enough.

**Dependencies:**
- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)
- [Create: The Factory Must Grow](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-tfmg)
- [Create: Vintage Improvements](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-vintage-improvements)

_The mod works with all versions of Create_
